title: Data collection dialog reappears after dismissing by tapping outside and clicking device card on first launch with location denied
steps: 1. Install the app and launch it for the first time.
2. When the location permission prompt appears, deny it.
3. Complete the onboarding flow (if any) until reaching the Find My Device (FMD) screen.
4. Observe that the data collection dialog is displayed on the FMD screen.
5. Tap outside the data collection dialog (e.g., tap on the background/scrim area) to dismiss it.
6. Verify the data collection dialog is dismissed and no longer visible.
7. Tap on any device card displayed on the FMD screen.
8. Observe the UI response.
expected: After tapping outside to dismiss the data collection dialog, tapping on a device card causes the data collection dialog to reappear. The dialog is shown again instead of performing the normal device card action (e.g., navigating to device details).

title: Data collection dialog does not reappear after accepting it and clicking device card on first launch with location denied
steps: 1. Install the app and launch it for the first time.
2. When the location permission prompt appears, deny it.
3. Complete the onboarding flow (if any) until reaching the Find My Device (FMD) screen.
4. Observe that the data collection dialog is displayed on the FMD screen.
5. Tap the accept/agree button on the data collection dialog to accept it.
6. Verify the data collection dialog is dismissed and no longer visible.
7. Tap on any device card displayed on the FMD screen.
8. Observe the UI response.
expected: After accepting the data collection dialog, tapping on a device card performs the normal expected action (e.g., navigating to device details) and the data collection dialog does NOT reappear.

title: Data collection dialog does not reappear after declining it and clicking device card on first launch with location denied
steps: 1. Install the app and launch it for the first time.
2. When the location permission prompt appears, deny it.
3. Complete the onboarding flow (if any) until reaching the Find My Device (FMD) screen.
4. Observe that the data collection dialog is displayed on the FMD screen.
5. Tap the decline/do-not-accept button on the data collection dialog to decline it.
6. Verify the data collection dialog is dismissed and no longer visible.
7. Tap on any device card displayed on the FMD screen.
8. Observe the UI response.
expected: After declining the data collection dialog, tapping on a device card performs the normal expected action (e.g., navigating to device details) and the data collection dialog does NOT reappear.

title: Data collection dialog reappears after dismissing by tapping outside repeatedly and clicking device card on first launch with location denied
steps: 1. Install the app and launch it for the first time.
2. When the location permission prompt appears, deny it.
3. Complete the onboarding flow (if any) until reaching the Find My Device (FMD) screen.
4. Observe that the data collection dialog is displayed on the FMD screen.
5. Tap outside the data collection dialog to dismiss it.
6. Verify the dialog is dismissed.
7. Tap on a device card and verify the data collection dialog reappears.
8. Tap outside the data collection dialog again to dismiss it.
9. Verify the dialog is dismissed again.
10. Tap on a different device card (or the same device card) on the FMD screen.
11. Observe the UI response.
expected: The data collection dialog reappears each time after dismissing it by tapping outside and then clicking a device card. This behavior repeats consistently — the dialog should not be permanently dismissable via tapping outside when a device card is subsequently clicked.

title: Data collection dialog does not reappear after dismissing by tapping outside and clicking non-interactive area on FMD screen with location denied
steps: 1. Install the app and launch it for the first time.
2. When the location permission prompt appears, deny it.
3. Complete the onboarding flow (if any) until reaching the Find My Device (FMD) screen.
4. Observe that the data collection dialog is displayed on the FMD screen.
5. Tap outside the data collection dialog to dismiss it.
6. Verify the data collection dialog is dismissed and no longer visible.
7. Tap on a non-interactive area of the FMD screen (e.g., empty space, background, or a label that is not a button or card).
8. Observe the UI response.
expected: After dismissing the data collection dialog by tapping outside, tapping on a non-interactive area of the FMD screen does NOT cause the data collection dialog to reappear. The dialog remains dismissed.
